description_long: This is a modern two-seater couch featuring a minimalist design with a rectangular silhouette. The seat and backrest are upholstered in smooth, solid black material, likely faux leather or vinyl, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The backrest is divided into two equal sections, each with a flat, unadorned surface, and both are attached directly to the frame. The frame and legs are constructed from medium-toned wood, with a visible horizontal support bar running along the back and sides, adding structural integrity and a touch of mid-century style. The legs are straight and cylindrical, slightly elevated to give the couch a light, airy feel. There are no visible armrests, accent pillows, or decorative stitching, emphasizing the clean and functional aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-seater couch with black upholstery and a wooden frame, featuring a divided backrest and no armrests. The design is sleek, minimalist, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the divided black backrest, wide seat cushion, and exposed wooden frame with no armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and back cushions, the straight wooden leg, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden support bar and the back of the divided cushions, with the wooden frame fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest, and the exposed wooden leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two rectangular seat cushions and two matching rectangular backrest cushions, all attached and flush with the frame, with no accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, straight cylindrical wooden legs of medium height, with a visible horizontal wooden support bar connecting the legs at the back and sides.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests present; the sides are open with only the wooden frame visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with two attached, flat rectangular cushions, continuous in height but visually separated in the center.
